citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
The written Program of Veterinary Care states that annual visits by the attending veterinarian will be made to the facility.
The facility representative did not provide a date of the last facility visit but stated that it occurred over a year ago. Failure
to follow the Program of Veterinary Care, including the frequency of facility visits, may negatively impact the health and
well-being of the animals.
To be corrected no later than July 15, 2026 by ensuring the program of veterinary care is followed and regular visits to the
premises by the attending veterinarian occur at the frequency defined in the program.

The facility has not completed an annual review of the contingency plan. No date of the last review was available. The
contingency plan must be reviewed at least annually to ensure any needed changes are made and communicated to all
personnel that have a role or responsibility in the plan to provide for the humane handling, treatment, transportation,
housing and care of the animals in the event of an emergency or disaster. The facility must ensure that the contingency
plan is reviewed at least annually and must maintain documentation of those reviews.
To be corrected by June 17, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.40(a)(1) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
The written Program of Veterinary Care states that annual visits by the attending veterinarian will be made to the facility. 
The facility representative did not provide a date of the last facility visit but stated that it occurred over a year ago. Failure 
to follow the Program of Veterinary Care, including the frequency of facility visits, may negatively impact the health and 
well-being of the animals. 
 
To be corrected no later than July 15, 2026 by ensuring the program of veterinary care is followed and regular visits to the 
premises by the attending veterinarian occur at the frequency defined in the program. 
2.134(b) 
   
Contingency planning. 
The facility has not completed an annual review of the contingency plan. No date of the last review was available. The 
contingency plan must be reviewed at least annually to ensure any needed changes are made and communicated to all 
personnel that have a role or responsibility in the plan to provide for the humane handling, treatment, transportation, 
housing and care of the animals in the event of an emergency or disaster. The facility must ensure that the contingency 
plan is reviewed at least annually and must maintain documentation of those reviews. 
 
To be corrected by June 17, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
